title: meibomia pulchella
intro: Meibomia pulchella, also known as Butterfly Weed or Orange Milkweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma, due to the presence of cardiac glycosides and saponins. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing fever. Meibomia pulchella can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and its dried roots and leaves can be used in herbal remedies.
